title: I Blew 3 Funded Accounts Before This Changed Everything
description: Three funded accounts gone. Then one ICT concept flipped everything. Fair value gaps aren't just patterns — they're the reason smart money wins every time. If you're struggling with funded accounts, watch this before your next trade. R2F Trading | ICT Coaching with 10+ years of real experience.
script: Three funded accounts. Blown. Same mistake every time. I had no idea what I was actually trading against. I was trading wicks. Candles. Random structure. Meanwhile smart money was sitting inside fair value gaps — and I kept walking straight into their trap. Once I learned to READ fair value gaps — not just see them — everything clicked. Fourth account. Still funded. Eleven months straight. Fair value gaps changed the game. Follow R2F Trading. We break this down every single day.
